preprocessing.note: 8th-order Butterworth HPF + 50/60 Hz notch filters. Killing sub-100Hz rumble before mel is critical for robustness across mic profiles.
Standard log-mel with hann window. See mel params above.
Cepstral mean normalization, subtract per-clip mean across time per mel bin. CRITICAL: model trained with CMN expects CMN'd input; omitting it makes the model wildly inaccurate.

trigger.note: Trigger when raw prob > threshold for `consecutive_frames` in a row, then suppress for `refractory_seconds`. ema_alpha is for display smoothing only (not the trigger gate; the EMA lags and was suppressing short, confident detections).

energy_gate.note: Skip the model entirely when gate fails. Prevents amplified-mic-noise false readings during silence.
